entries.text: The new checkout flow is confusing — took me 4 tries to complete a payment
Love the new dashboard layout, much cleaner and easier to navigate
App crashed twice while trying to use the new checkout feature
The new feature is okay, not sure why I need it yet
Payment failed three times in a row — had to fall back to the old method
Finally! This is what we were waiting for, works great
Where did the settings menu go? Can't find anything after the update
Everything is super slow since the update — pages take forever to load
Works great on my end, no issues whatsoever
Crash on startup after updating — iPhone 13, iOS 17
Different from what I expected but I'll give it another week before judging
Three of my team members cannot log in at all since the update
The speed improvements are genuinely noticeable on the new flow
I was charged twice for the same transaction — please refund ASAP
App is completely unusable on Android 12, constant crashes every 2 minutes
Smooth experience, the new onboarding guide is really helpful
Support ticket open for 2 days with no response — this is unacceptable
Noticed the update, seems fine so far but haven't used the new checkout yet
The API keeps throwing 504 errors intermittently — integration is broken
Best update in a while, everything works perfectly for me
Funnel step 3 just spins forever and never completes — bug or feature?
Same crash issue as others are reporting — new feature is completely unusable
Haven't tried the new feature yet, waiting to see if bugs get fixed
I actually prefer this over your competitors now — please keep the direction
Downgraded my subscription plan because of all these issues — not acceptable
Payment gateway is clearly broken for international cards — Amex won't go through
Clean UI design, very intuitive flow — whoever designed this did a great job
Why was this even built? I don't understand the use case at all
Please rollback — the old version was significantly better and more reliable
Mixed feelings honestly — some things are better, some are definitely worse
